user_goal: 按 MVP PRD §12 路线图在 B006 Global ETF Momentum 与 B010 Risk Parity Backtest MVP 基础上实现 Master Portfolio Allocation MVP：组合两个 core sleeves（momentum 40% + risk parity 30%）并预留 satellite interface stubs（US quality 20% + HK-China 10%）、季度再平衡 workflow、账户级 15% drawdown kill-switch（冻结非防御性增仓 + human-review-required clearance）、组合层 reports 含 calculated baseline（吸收 BL-B010-S2），同时保持 fixture/mock-first CI、snapshot/data-quality semantics 和 no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI safety guards。

evaluator_feedback.summary: B011 L1 checks and most Master Portfolio acceptance areas pass, but the workflow does not enforce quarterly cadence: it executes every supplied signal_date, including multiple intra-quarter dates. B011 must return to fixing.

issues.description: Master Portfolio quarterly workflow accepts and executes every supplied signal_date instead of deriving/filtering/validating quarter-end dates. This means the Master can consume intra-quarter child signals, violating the B011 quarterly-only acceptance.
issues.steps_to_reproduce: Run run_master_portfolio_quarterly_backtest() with same-quarter signal_dates (2024-03-10, 2024-03-20, 2024-03-25) and valid synthetic SPY/VEA/AGG/GLD/SGOV records plus short child params. The result contains three rebalance_results with those same three signal dates.

issues.description: Independent evaluation cannot sign off while F002 has a blocking quarterly cadence gap.

generator_handoff: Generator completed B011 F001-F005 in one session. New modules: trade/portfolio/master.py (configuration boundary), trade/backtest/master_portfolio.py (quarterly rebalance + kill-switch engine with apply_kill_switch_constraint and drawdown_against_hwm helpers), trade/reporting/master_portfolio.py (JSON/Markdown report with calculated 60/40 baseline absorbing BL-B010-S2). New tests: tests/unit/test_master_portfolio_config.py (18), tests/unit/test_master_portfolio_backtest.py (12), tests/unit/test_master_portfolio_kill_switch.py (13), tests/unit/test_master_portfolio_report.py (11), tests/unit/test_master_portfolio_safety_guards.py (10). Default planning weights 0.40/0.30/0.20/0.10. Account-level 15% drawdown kill-switch triggers off rolling HWM, caps non-defensive weights at prior period values, requires explicit kill_switch_clearance_signal_dates to lift. Reports expose full account_risk payload with events trace and never claim paper/live execution. Local checks: pytest (155), ruff, compileall, mypy. Evaluator should run F006 L1 verification and confirm BL-B010-S2 absorption is recorded.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-13: Closed B010 done wrap-up (added BL-B010-S1 / BL-B010-S2 to backlog, session_notes refreshed). User confirmed next batch direction: B011 Portfolio Allocation and Risk MVP per MVP PRD §12 + docs/strategy/00-master-portfolio-allocation.md. Decisions captured: (1) two core sleeves implemented + satellite interface stubs reserved, (2) quarterly Master rebalance with monthly cadence noted as future option, (3) 15% drawdown kill-switch freezes new non-defensive exposure + requires explicit clearance + emits human_review_required flag (recommended by planner, accepted by user), (4) BL-B010-S2 absorbed into B011 F004 calculated baseline. Wrote B011 spec and features.json (6 features: F001-F005 generator + F006 codex). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-13: B011 F001-F005 completed across one session. F001 added trade/portfolio/master.py with the Master Portfolio configuration boundary (sleeves, planning weights, defensive asset, drawdown threshold, max_exposure, kill-switch clearance parameter) plus validation. F002 added trade/backtest/master_portfolio.py with run_master_portfolio_quarterly_backtest, MasterChildStrategyParameters, MasterSleeveContribution, MasterRebalancePeriodResult, and MasterPortfolioBacktestResult, aggregating child target weights with planning weights, routing satellite stub allocation to defensive, executing at T+1 open, valuing at next signal date, and chaining capital across periods. F003 added apply_kill_switch_constraint, drawdown_against_hwm, MasterAccountRiskState, MasterKillSwitchEvent, kill_switch_clearance_signal_dates parameter, and per-period pre_rebalance_account_risk_state + weights_capped_by_kill_switch; account-level kill-switch caps non-defensive weights at prior period values when triggered. F004 added trade/reporting/master_portfolio.py with JSON/Markdown reports exposing aggregated equity curve, CAGR/vol/Sharpe/max drawdown/turnover/transaction costs, per-child sleeve contributions, planning vs effective weights, snapshot references, full account_risk payload, calculated static 60/40 baseline (absorbs BL-B010-S2), and research-only limitations. F005 added tests/unit/test_master_portfolio_safety_guards.py with regression coverage: no network/credential/broker/AI/public-import/frontend imports in master modules, offline run without env or secrets, no writes to trade/data/fixtures/, reports never claim paper/live execution, defaults carry no broker/live language, leveraged max_exposure fails validation, public-import stub never auto-invoked, and kill-switch state is deterministic and visible in report payload. Full local checks pass: pytest (155 tests), ruff, compileall, mypy. Status moved to verifying for F006 Codex.
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-13: B011 F006 first-round L1 verification completed. Full checks pass (pytest 155, ruff, compileall, mypy; B011 subset 64 passed under env -i), reports/baseline/safety mostly pass, but F002 has a blocking gap: run_master_portfolio_quarterly_backtest executes arbitrary same-quarter signal_dates instead of enforcing quarter-end-only cadence. Wrote test cases + review, no signoff, status moved to fixing with F002 pending.
